message:
fix: Daily Issues & PRs shows demo data on Netlify instead of zeros (#8640)

The GitHub proxy (/api/github/*) only exists on the Go backend. On
Netlify the SPA catch-all returns HTML with status 200, which the
card parsed as empty JSON — showing 0/0/0. Now detects non-JSON
responses and throws so the demo fallback triggers with realistic
random data.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
